item.title: 【Lua】在 Android 上直接用 Lua 调用 Java API 编写脚本——AutoLua 技术分享
item.description:
[Lua] Android 上直接用 Lua 调 Java API 写脚本——AutoLua 技术分享

AutoLua allows Android developers to write scripts using Lua that directly call Java APIs, overcoming the limitations of existing automation tools. By providing a full Lua runtime and bridging all Android APIs, users can achieve the same functionality in Lua as they can in Java.

AutoLua 允许 Android 开发者使用 Lua 脚本直接调用 Java API，克服了现有自动化工具的限制。它提供了一个完整的 Lua 运行时，并桥接了所有 Android API，使用户能够在 Lua 中实现与 Java 相同的多项功能。

Tags: android · lua · java · automation · api

item.title: [OpenAI] ChatGPT Plus 续费失败后，整理一下我试过的几种方式
item.description:
[OpenAI] ChatGPT Plus 续费失败后，整理一下我试过的几种方式

This article shares various methods attempted to overcome issues with renewing ChatGPT Plus subscriptions, including card rejections and payment failures. The author discusses self-binding cards, using friends' overseas cards, virtual cards, and代充 (proxy charging), ultimately recommending a service that ensured successful payment without requesting sensitive information.

这篇文章分享了作者尝试过的几种解决 ChatGPT Plus 续费失败问题的方法，包括银行卡被拒和支付失败。作者讨论了自己绑定卡、使用朋友的海外卡、虚拟卡以及代充等方式，并推荐了一个无需敏感信息即可成功充值的服务。

Tags: chatgpt · openai · subscription · payment · renewal

item.description:
Gasoline prices just fell below $4 per gallon — by the smallest possible amount

Gasoline prices have officially dropped below $4 per gallon, marking a significant milestone. However, the decrease was minimal, indicating a very narrow margin for this price reduction.

Tags: gasoline · prices · economy · market · inflation

item.description:

A programmer is asking if the 'max' tier of glm is experiencing slow performance today. They are using the 'opencode' go tier and finding glm 5.2 to be slow, and are curious if the legitimate max tier is also experiencing similar issues.

item.title: Warsh 希望更多地倾听市场。摩根士丹利称市场可能会后悔
item.description:
Warsh wants to listen to markets more. Morgan Stanley says markets may regret it.

Former Fed Chair Kevin Warsh expressed a desire to listen more to market signals, but Morgan Stanley strategists believe markets might regret taking a leading role. This suggests a debate on the influence of market sentiment versus central bank policy.

前美联储主席 Kevin Warsh 表示希望更多地倾听市场信号，但摩根士丹利策略师认为市场可能会后悔承担主导角色。这表明市场情绪与央行政策影响力之间存在争论。

Tags: fed · market · economy · policy · morgan stanley

item.title: 尼日尔首都机场发生枪击和爆炸事件
item.description:
Gunfire and explosions heard at Niger capital's airport

Gunfire and explosions were reported at the airport in Niger's capital, a country that has been battling a decade-long militant Islamist insurgency. This incident follows a similar suspected jihadist attack at the same airport in January.

尼日尔首都机场发生枪击和爆炸事件，该国正与长达十年的伊斯兰武装分子叛乱作斗争。此次事件紧随一月份在同一机场发生的疑似圣战分子袭击事件。

Tags: niger · terrorism · conflict · security · africa

item.title: “我们的房子已经还清了：我 67 岁，年收入 10 万美元。现在领取 3 万美元/年的社会保障金，还是等一等？
item.description:
‘We own our home outright’: I am 67 and earn $100,000. Do I take my $30,000-a-year Social Security now or wait?

A 67-year-old earning $100,000 annually with no mortgage and significant savings ($950,000) is seeking advice on when to claim their $30,000 annual Social Security benefits. The decision involves weighing current income needs against potential future increases.

一位 67 岁、年收入 10 万美元、无房贷且拥有可观储蓄（95 万美元）的人正在寻求关于何时领取每年 3 万美元社会保障金的建议。这个决定需要在当前收入需求和未来可能增加的收益之间权衡。

Tags: retirement · social security · finance · advice · seniors

item.title: 地球工程仍面临重大实际挑战
item.description:
Geoengineering still faces major practical challenges

Solar geoengineering, proposed as an emergency climate solution, faces significant practical challenges and is far from a simple fix. The technology of scattering light-reflecting particles to cool the planet is described as a complicated, unsolved puzzle.

太阳辐射管理地球工程作为一种紧急气候解决方案，面临着重大的实际挑战，远非易事。将光反射粒子散布以冷却地球的技术被描述为一个复杂且尚未解决的难题。

Tags: climate change · geoengineering · environment · science · technology

item.title: 莫斯科遭到自俄罗斯全面战争以来规模最大的乌克兰袭击
item.description:
Moscow hit by largest Ukrainian attack since start of Russia's full-scale war

Moscow experienced its largest Ukrainian attack since the full-scale war began, with nearly 200 drones striking an area southeast of the capital. The attack resulted in a refinery and a shopping center catching fire.

莫斯科自俄罗斯全面战争爆发以来，首次遭到规模最大的乌克兰袭击，近 200 架无人机袭击了首都东南部地区。袭击导致一家炼油厂和一家购物中心起火。

Tags: ukraine · russia · war · drone attack · moscow

item.title: 苹果“不可避免”的涨价与新兴市场创纪录高点之间的联系
item.description:
Here’s the link between Apple’s ‘unavoidable’ price hikes and all-time highs for emerging markets

Following Apple CEO Tim Cook's announcement of unavoidable price hikes due to microchip costs, semiconductor producers in South Korea and Taiwan saw their markets reach all-time highs. This highlights the interconnectedness of tech supply chains and global markets.

在苹果 CEO Tim Cook 宣布因微芯片成本导致价格上涨不可避免后，韩国和台湾的半导体生产商市场均创下历史新高。这凸显了科技供应链和全球市场的相互关联性。

Tags: apple · semiconductors · market · economy · tech

item.title: 涉嫌黑帮头目在机场花束伏击中被枪杀
item.description:
Suspected gang leader shot dead in flower bouquet ambush at airport

A suspected gang leader was shot dead in an ambush outside Guayaquil airport, with gunmen concealing weapons within flower bouquets and stuffed toys. The perpetrators targeted the victim as he arrived.

一名涉嫌黑帮头目在瓜亚基尔机场外的一场伏击中被枪杀，枪手将武器藏在花束和填充玩具中。袭击者在受害者抵达时就对其进行攻击。

Tags: crime · ecuador · gang violence · airport · ambush

item.title: 暗物质的搜寻已全面展开
item.description:
The search for dark matter has been blown wide open

A global hunt for dark matter is underway in specialized underground laboratories, including those beneath the Jinping Mountains and in a South Dakota mine. These facilities utilize massive liquid xenon detectors to achieve direct detection of this elusive invisible substance.

一场全球性的暗物质搜寻正在地下实验室展开，包括锦屏山和南达科他州矿井下的设施。这些地方利用大型液氙探测器直接探测这种难以捉摸的不可见物质。

Tags: dark matter · physics · astronomy · science · research

item.title: 中国游戏的错位竞争：头部赌 3A，腰部吃存量 | 游戏风向标
item.description:
中国游戏的错位竞争：头部赌3A，腰部吃存量 | 游戏风向标

China's gaming industry is at a crossroads, with top companies like Tencent and NetEase investing heavily in AAA single-player games, while mid-tier companies focus on established genres and existing user bases. This 'misaligned competition' strategy sees large players aiming for global prestige and smaller ones consolidating their niche markets.

中国游戏行业正处于一个十字路口，腾讯和网易等头部公司大力投资 AAA 单机游戏，而腰部公司则专注于已有的游戏类型和用户群体。这种“错位竞争”策略是大型公司追求全球声望，而小型公司则巩固其细分市场。

Tags: gaming · china · aaa games · industry · competition

item.description:
Midjourney goes from generating cat images to full-body ultrasound scans

Midjourney's CEO, David Holz, unveiled the company's first hardware product, The Midjourney Scanner, an ultrasound-based full-body scanner. This marks a significant pivot from their AI image generation, moving into medical imaging technology.

Midjourney 的 CEO David Holz 展示了公司首款硬件产品——基于超声波的全身扫描仪 Midjourney Scanner。这标志着他们从 AI 图像生成领域转向医学影像技术。

Tags: midjourney · ai · hardware · medical imaging · ultrasound

item.title: 北大科学家下场做脑机接口，种子轮融了近亿元
item.description:
北大科学家下场做脑机接口，种子轮融了近亿元

Beijing University scientists have launched 'Xin Sheng Shi Jie' (芯生视界), an invasive brain-computer interface (BCI) company, securing nearly 100 million RMB in seed funding. The company aims to develop advanced BCI systems for vision, language, and embodiment integration, leveraging AI and neuroscience expertise.

北京大学的科学家们成立了侵入式脑机接口公司“芯生视界”，并获得了近 1 亿元人民币的种子轮融资。该公司旨在利用人工智能和神经科学的专业知识，开发用于视觉、语言和具身融合的先进脑机接口系统。

Tags: bci · neuroscience · ai · startup · funding

item.title: 美伊协议包含什么内容？
item.description:
What's in the US-Iran agreement?

The US-Iran agreement memo outlines an end to fighting, a commitment from Iran to never possess nuclear weapons, and a $300 billion redevelopment package for Iran. This accord aims to de-escalate tensions and foster reconstruction.

美伊协议备忘录概述了结束敌对行动、伊朗承诺永不拥有核武器以及为伊朗提供 3000 亿美元的重建计划。这项协议旨在缓和紧张局势并促进重建。

Tags: iran · us · diplomacy · nuclear weapons · agreement

item.title: 古代遗迹可能是早期巨石阵的原型
item.description:
Ancient monument may have been an early Stonehenge prototype

Archaeologists have discovered evidence of a 5,000-year-old wooden structure near Stonehenge that appears to predate it and may have served as an earlier monument for marking the summer solstice. This finding suggests a prototype for the famous prehistoric site.

考古学家在巨石阵附近发现了一个 5000 年前的木结构遗迹，该遗迹似乎比巨石阵更古老，并可能曾是标记夏至的早期纪念碑。这一发现暗示了著名史前遗址的原型。

Tags: archaeology · stonehenge · ancient · history · monument

item.title: 英格兰多年来没有年轻女性死于宫颈癌
item.description:
No young women have died of cervical cancer in England for years

For several years, no young women in England have died from cervical cancer, a significant achievement attributed to the HPV vaccine. This evidence demonstrates the vaccine's effectiveness in not only reducing infections and cancer cases but also preventing deaths.

多年来，英格兰没有年轻女性死于宫颈癌，这是HPV疫苗接种取得的显著成就。这证明了该疫苗不仅能有效减少感染和宫颈癌病例，还能预防死亡。

Tags: health · cancer · vaccine · hpv · england

item.title: 日本加强防御对防止战争“至关重要”，防卫大臣小泉告诉 BBC
item.description:
Japan ramping up defence is 'critical' to prevent war, Defence Minister Koizumi tells BBC

Japanese Defense Minister Koizumi believes strengthening Japan's defense capabilities is critical to preventing war, advocating for a revisit of the nation's post-WWII pacifist stance. This signals a significant shift in Japan's security policy.

日本防卫大臣小泉认为，加强日本的防御能力对于防止战争至关重要，并主张重新审视该国二战后的和平主义立场。这标志着日本安全政策的重大转变。

Tags: japan · defense · security · war · politics

为应对 ChatGPT Ads，开发了一个名为“openai-ads-skill”的开源Agent Skill，以提供更安全的工作流程。它强调先规划和验证，再执行，确保在花费金钱前获得人工批准。

item.title: 我继承了50万美元的IRA。我能通过用它支付孩子的教育费用来减轻税务负担吗？
item.description:
I inherited a $500,000 IRA. Can I reduce the tax burden by using it for my children’s education?

An individual inherited a $500,000 IRA and is inquiring about the possibility of reducing their tax burden by using these funds for their children's education. This raises questions about the tax implications of withdrawing from an inherited IRA for educational purposes.

一位继承了50万美元IRA的个人，正在咨询是否能通过将这笔资金用于子女教育来减轻税务负担。这引发了关于从继承的IRA中提取资金用于教育目的的税务影响的问题。

OpenAI Reveals China-Linked Influence Campaign

OpenAI has revealed an influence campaign that has links to China. The company has taken steps to address this issue, highlighting concerns about foreign interference in online discourse. More details are expected as the investigation unfolds.

OpenAI揭露了一项与中国有关的影响活动。该公司已采取措施解决此问题，强调了对外国干预在线言论的担忧。随着调查的展开，预计将有更多细节公布。

Tags: openai · influence campaign · china · security
